/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/todolist.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/todolist.dir/todolist_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/todolist.dir/src/EditableLabel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/todolist.dir/src/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/todolist.dir/src/TodoItemWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/todolist.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o todolist  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.9.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.9.1 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.9.1
